summary: Iteration 141 - All 3 urgent features verified: Manual POS Entry, Customer Email Autofill, and Discover Card Customization. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All components verified working.

issues: Modal overlay intercepts clicks - requires force=True to click Add to Cart button (minor UX issue)

critical_code_review_comments: Manual Entry: Custom Item button visible, form with Name/Description/Price, 8% platform fee preview working
Customer Autofill: Name, Phone, Email fields present with [data-testid] attributes, search API working
Card Customization: 8 color gradients palette, custom color input, image upload, preview toggle, save working
WebSocket card_settings_updated event confirmed in backend code
CRM showing customers created from POS transactions - autofill will work for returning customers
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test customers via POS transactions: Test Customer POS ($27.00) and John AutoFill Test ($24.60)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 141 tested 3 urgent features for Blendlink Pages. All working. Manual Entry adds is_custom=true flag to cart items. Customer search API works via pos-customers/search endpoint. Card settings saved via PUT card-settings and broadcast via WebSocket. Test page mpage_000a72b44296 now has 2 customers in CRM from test orders.

ui_elements.custom_item_button: [data-testid='manual-entry-btn'] - Orange 'Custom Item' button next to search
ui_elements.fee_preview: Shows Item Price and Platform Fee (8%) dynamically

ui_elements.custom_color_input: Text input for hex or linear-gradient
